codeReview.summary: The feature contract is satisfied. The EUR assertion now derives from the mutable bootstrap currency snapshot instead of a stale hard-coded value, and the frontend smoke test isolates the broad endpoint script from live DeFiLlama catalog fetches by stubbing the provider to the existing null/fallback path. The changes are scoped to tests and do not weaken production runtime behavior.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, and commit 7ed599d. The implementation cleanly stabilizes both targeted regressions with test-only changes and no review issues were found.
